user_context: missing my bother from anthor bother
hook: Nobody talks about the dread of smiling at 10 faces.
slide2: He’s the only one who ever really saw me. Like, actually saw me. The rest just nod and scroll.
slide3: I could be in a room full of people and still feel like a ghost. Laughing alone in my head.
slide4: I keep expecting him to text. Then I remember he’s not coming back. No second chances.
closer: Would you rather be lonely surrounded or lonely alone?
caption: The worst part isn’t missing him. It’s pretending I don’t when I do. When do you stop feeling guilty for loving someone so much?
